2026-02-26TCFinancial Administration ActOrder Authorizing VIA HFR – VIA TGF to increase the maximum number of its directors to 11Order authorizing VIA HFR – VIA TGF Inc. to apply for articles of amendments to increase the maximum number of its directors from seven to eleven.N/A
subject: Order Authorizing VIA HFR – VIA TGF to increase the maximum number of its directors to 11
precis: Order authorizing VIA HFR – VIA TGF Inc. to apply for articles of amendments to increase the maximum number of its directors from seven to eleven.
